A passive-aggressive AI forced me to jump through shiny holes in the wall, and I didn't even get the cake I was promised.
I just run around a maze eating yellow dots while ghosts chase me. Pretty sure this is a metaphor for my life.
I spent an hour organizing falling blocks, and then a long straight one refused to appear when I needed it most.
I spawned, took two steps, and a 12-year-old sniped me from across the map while screaming into the mic. 10/10 multiplayer experience.
Quit my corporate job to inherit a farm. Now I'm aggressively gifting mayonnaise to townsfolk so they'll marry me.
My adopted daughter is missing and the world is ending, but sure, I have time for a few rounds of cards with the local merchant.
It's just soccer but with rocket-powered cars. I spent most of the match flying through the air and completely missing the giant ball.
I stepped on a twig, a giant demon jumped out of nowhere, and the screen told me I died. I've been crying for an hour. Best game ever.
I'm a bean in a hot dog costume getting yeeted off a seesaw by a pigeon. This is the pinnacle of competitive gaming.
A guy in overalls eats mushrooms to grow larger and jumps on turtles to save a princess who is never where she's supposed to be.
Bought it on release day. My car phased through a building, an NPC T-posed to assert dominance, and my game crashed. Beautiful neon aesthetic though.
My kid asked for my credit card to buy a blocky hat. Now my life savings are gone, but at least their avatar looks cool in the pizza minigame.
I'm supposed to be a stealthy killer, but I just spent 20 minutes trying to climb through a window while guards watched me awkwardly hop against the wall.
Every weapon I find breaks after hitting two enemies. I cook suspicious monster meat in a pot to survive. A masterpiece.
Set an alarm for 3 AM so I could upgrade my town hall. My village got raided by someone named xX_DragonSlayer_Xx while I was brushing my teeth.
